definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I am going to the store.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I am going to the store.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate movement or direction toward a destination.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to indicate movement or direction toward a destination.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Move away from the car.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Moving or being farther from someone or something.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Moving or being farther from someone or something.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Walk toward the station.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: In the direction of something. 'Toward' is the common American form; 'towards' is also understood.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In the direction of something. 'Toward' is the common American form; 'towards' is also understood.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He walked into the room.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Indicates movement to the inside of a place (compare 'in').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Indicates movement to the inside of a place (compare 'in').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Please get out of the car.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Please get out of the car.
definitions.usage_context_en: Indicates movement from the inside to the outside.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Indicates movement from the inside to the outside.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The cat jumped onto the table.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The cat jumped onto the table.
definitions.usage_context_en: Indicates movement to a position on a surface (compare 'on').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Indicates movement to a position on a surface (compare 'on').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Walk down from the hill.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Moving from a higher place to a lower place.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Moving from a higher place to a lower place.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Take your feet off the table.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Take your feet off the table.
definitions.usage_context_en: Away from a place or position; indicating separation or removal.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Away from a place or position; indicating separation or removal.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He walked around the lake.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Moving in a circle or surrounding something.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Moving in a circle or surrounding something.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: It costs around 20 dollars.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate approximation (time, quantity, or number).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to indicate approximation (time, quantity, or number).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: We walked through the forest.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Moving in one side and out the other side of an enclosed space.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Moving in one side and out the other side of an enclosed space.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I found the job through a friend.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I found the job through a friend.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate the means or method by which something is achieved.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to indicate the means or method by which something is achieved.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I am from Colombia.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate the point of origin or source.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to indicate the point of origin or source.]
